assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A section: Task 1 (upstream backport) has Labels: ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123 and Link: Depend -> TC-8020. Task 2 (downstream propagation) has the same labels and Link: Depend -> TC-8020.

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md states 'Stream rhtpa-2.1 (2.1.x): AFFECTED -- tokio 1.40.0 < 1.42.0 (cross-stream impact)' and 'Stream rhtpa-2.1: No CVE Jira exists -- no sibling Vulnerability issue found' and 'This triggers Case B (preemptive remediation) for stream rhtpa-2.1.' remediation.md creates Tasks 3 and 4 under 'Case B: Preemptive Remediation Tasks (Stream rhtpa-2.1)'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 labels: 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive'. Task 4 labels: identical set. cross-stream.md comparison table confirms preemptive tasks carry all four labels.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3: 'Link: Related -> TC-8020'. Task 4: 'Link: Related -> TC-8020'. cross-stream.md comparison table explicitly contrasts: Standard (Case A) uses 'Depend', Preemptive (Case B) uses 'Related'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Tasks 3 and 4 both contain the prefix: '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.'
